acceptQuickstartDefaults: Accept quickstart defaults (trusted local loopback unless --bind is set) and start immediately
allowedHostnameDescription: Allow a hostname for authenticated/private mode access
apiBaseUrl: Base URL for the Paperclip server API
bootstrapCeoDescription: Create a one-time bootstrap invite URL for first instance admin
browserOpened: Opened the approval page in your browser.
challengeExpired: CLI auth challenge expired before approval.
dataDirOption: Paperclip data directory root (isolates state from ~/.paperclip)
dbBackupDescription: Create a one-off database backup using current config
doctorDescription: Run diagnostic checks on your Paperclip setup
forceCreateInvite: Create new invite even if admin already exists
heartbeatRunDescription: Run one agent heartbeat and stream live logs
openApprovalUrl:
Open this URL in your browser to approve CLI access:
{{url}}
programDescription: Paperclip CLI — setup, diagnose, and configure your instance
publicBaseUrl: Public base URL used to print invite link
runDescription: Bootstrap local setup (onboard + doctor) and run Paperclip
sectionToConfigure: Section to configure (llm, database, logging, server, storage, secrets)
showRawAdapterJson: Show raw adapter stdout/stderr JSON chunks
startAfterSavingConfig: Start Paperclip immediately after saving config
timeoutMs: Max time to wait before giving up
